stories: Executive summary (as of Sat, Jun 27, 2026 14:49 UTC):
Strait of Hormuz: vessel strike keeps an oil/shipping risk premium bid into the weekend
Micron’s blowout beat: memory/AI compute sentiment gets a jolt
Oracle’s capitulation week: markets are stress-testing “AI financing” narratives
EU/Brussels trade-policy shock watch: move to keep a “valuable metal” at home
Germany regulatory headline risk: BaFin flags potentially omitted info tied to Zalando–About You
USPS to Congress: business model “broken” — policy/funding/contractor read-through
Gold stays pressured: hawkish Fed tone + stronger USD remain the headwind
Insider overhang (YOU): Clear Secure CEO reports ~$11.3M in sales (10b5-1 plan flagged)
Microcap float/ownership shock (ADTX): 10% holder exits entirely at ~$0.02
Crypto as the weekend risk gauge: Bitcoin hits ~$58,000; short-squeeze talk rises
